title: Sun Lei
content:
overview
[
]

Sun Lei is a cultivator from the 
Da Lou Sword Sect
, a large and influential sect based on 
Planet Da Lou
. Within the Celestial Realm, he becomes entangled in a complex encounter with Wang Lin. Although Sun Lei’s true cultivation is only at the Middle stage of Soul Formation, he conceals his strength and behaves with caution, maintaining a guarded and strategic attitude toward Wang Lin.

Sun Lei’s goal is to obtain a celestial sword hidden within a perilous cave. However, he is unable to claim it, as the weapon is bound by a powerful restriction that requires prolonged refinement before it can be wielded. Seeking assistance, Sun Lei proposes a cooperation with Wang Lin—offering the other two treasures found in the cave, a celestial jade and a celestial metal, in exchange for help in acquiring the sword. Wang Lin refuses, aware of the sword’s limitations and the potential danger involved.

Despite mutual suspicion, the two proceed together cautiously. Wang Lin protects Sun Lei during moments of cultivation and while fending off beast feeds, yet underlying tension persists. Sun Lei hesitates to part with a valuable purification wood and continues to distrust Wang Lin’s hidden power.

Eventually, after a fierce battle near the cave’s entrance, Wang Lin helps restore Sun Lei’s damaged cultivation. When Sun Lei later attempts to seize the celestial sword himself, the sword’s restriction backfires—gravely injuring him. In contrast, Wang Lin escapes unharmed, using a 
Restriction flag
 to flee the collapsing cave, leaving Sun Lei wounded and unable to obtain the treasure he desires.
